queue.message:
Add Docker compose, nginx config, and project documentation.

Baseline deployment and setup guides for local development.

Add Express API backend with Prisma and queue workers.

Core modules for leads, calls, pipeline, billing, and webhooks.

Add Next.js frontend scaffold and supporting modules.

Base config, hooks, widget, and analytics/automation routes.

Add enterprise design tokens and shared UI components.

Introduce semantic Tailwind colors, globals.css utilities, and reusable PageHeader, StatCard, and Badge components.

Centralize demo data and API helpers for offline UI development.

Unify mock leads, calls, and platform stats so dashboard pages stay consistent in demo mode.

Implement demo-mode authentication and role-based routing.

Allow local exploration without backend; route super admins to the platform console.

Redesign dashboard layout with sidebar and topbar navigation.

Standardize nav items, organization context, and mobile menu behavior.

Rebuild marketing landing page with interactive product preview.

Add hero, trust metrics, feature bento grid, testimonials, and pricing sections.

Refactor dashboard overview with StatCard metrics and charts.

Replace legacy styling with shared components and consistent demo analytics.

Polish leads database and call logs pages.

Use data tables, detail panels, and professional copy without emoji filters.

Improve pipeline kanban and WhatsApp workspace UI.

Light-theme slide-overs, badge components, and structured conversation layout.

Update settings, automations, and authentication screens.

Apply tabbed settings layout and consistent form styling across login and register.

Add platform administrator console for tenant management.

Overview stats, organization table, suspend and reactivate actions with demo support.

Add backend platform APIs and super-admin tenant bypass.

Platform org listing, stats endpoints, seed data, and RBAC updates.

Add frontend theme migration scripts for design refactors.

Utility scripts to batch-update class names across dashboard pages.
